title: RSSB – Teaching Associate – 3540 Posts

basic_details.job_title: RSSB Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 3540 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 3540 Teaching Associate. Candidates with Any Masters Degree, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 05-05-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RSSB website, rssb.rajasthan.gov.in/.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SSO Portal.
seo_tags: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026
